message:
fix(vacuum): also preserve original DDL for CREATE INDEX entries

Extends the original DDL preservation to index entries, not just tables.
This ensures partial index WHERE clauses, collation names, and other
index-specific SQL is preserved exactly as written rather than
reconstructed via string concatenation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
